description_long: This is a roughly oval, flat stone slab featuring an intricate bas-relief carving of a celestial or mythological figure, possibly inspired by East Asian art. The figure is depicted in flowing robes with elongated, swirling ribbons or clouds extending around them, suggesting movement and grace. The carving is detailed, with fine lines outlining the figure's face, clothing, and the surrounding motifs, which include stylized clouds or waves. The stone itself has a weathered, matte surface with visible textural irregularities and some edge chipping, indicating age or exposure. The reverse side is unadorned and rough, showing the natural stone texture. This object would likely serve as a decorative or commemorative element in a public or garden setting.
description: A flat, oval stone slab with an elaborate bas-relief carving of a flowing, robed figure surrounded by swirling motifs. The surface is weathered and textured, with detailed artistry on one side.
description_view_0: The front view displays the full carved relief of the robed figure with swirling ribbons and clouds, showing the most detail and artistic features.
description_view_1: The edge view reveals the stone's thin, flat profile and highlights its irregular, chipped perimeter.
description_view_2: The back view shows the uncarved, rough stone surface, lacking any decorative features and emphasizing the natural texture.
description_view_3: The angled side view provides a sense of the stone's thickness and the relief depth, with some carving details visible along the edge.
attribute_location: public park, temple courtyard, or memorial garden
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature, upright or slightly angled for visibility
attribute_pattern: Intricate bas-relief carving of a robed figure with swirling cloud or ribbon motifs, highly detailed and artistic, covering one face of the stone.
attribute_weathering: Surface appears matte and slightly rough with minor edge chipping, indicating moderate weathering and age.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically stands out as a focal point, contrasting with natural greenery or architectural elements, but may be partially surrounded by plants or set on a stone base.
